# TASK-020: Real-time Dashboard

**Milestone**: V0.0.5 - User Experience Optimization
**Priority**: Medium
**Estimated Time**: 10 hours
**Dependencies**: V0.0.4 (Bitable Integration), TASK-018, TASK-019

## Description
Implement a real-time dashboard for monitoring task orchestration status, agent performance, and system health.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Design dashboard UI/UX
- [ ] Implement real-time data streaming
- [ ] Create performance metrics visualization
- [ ] Add task status tracking
- [ ] Implement agent health monitoring
- [ ] Add system resource monitoring
- [ ] Create alert system
- [ ] Unit tests with 70%+ coverage

## Implementation Plan
1. Design dashboard architecture
2. Create data streaming layer
3. Build metrics collection system
4. Implement visualization components
5. Add real-time updates
6. Create alert system
7. Write tests
8. Document dashboard features

## Technical Details
- Use WebSocket for real-time updates
- Integrate with Bitable for data
- Implement efficient data streaming
- Create responsive UI
